rule.title: Exported async functions must open an OTel span (R8)

check.message: Exported async function must open an OTel span (tracer.startActiveSpan / withSpan) — R8.

examples.bad: export async function action() { return { ok: true }; }
examples.good: export async function action() { return tracer.startActiveSpan('action', async (span) => { span.end(); return { ok: true }; }); }
